# Projected Housing Needs {#sec-projections}

<!-- Purpose: projected housing needs through 2050 from Weldon Cooper population projections (PLAN.md §7 Ch 6). -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Figures, tables, and findings are built in Session 11 (PLAN.md §7, §9).*
